entry.title: Sample Post
entry.content:
layout: single Title: “Sample Blog Post with LaTeX and Plots”
Date: 2025-08-16
Categories: [blog] —

This is a sample post converted from a Jupyter notebook.

The formula $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$ is Pythagoras’ theorem.

Block math example:

\[\int_0^\infty e^{-x} dx = 1\]

Here’s a sample plot:
